creator: dmitryluhtionov@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 181091
sysctl hw.dri.0.info.i915_error_state

During boot process screen freezes on some time, and I see these lines in dmesg:

Mar 23 11:35:09 m18 kernel: error: [drm:pid12:i915_hangcheck_hung] *ERROR* Hangcheck timer elapsed... GPU hung
Mar 23 11:35:09 m18 kernel: info: [drm] capturing error event; look for more information in sysctl hw.dri.0.info.i915_error_state
Mar 23 11:35:09 m18 kernel: error: [drm:pid968:i915_write32] *ERROR* Unknown unclaimed register before writing to 20a8
